payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark gray/black painted fireplace showing a rectangular recessed firebox with stepped/molded surround; the interior is shadowed black and the lower left edge is occluded by a nearby tabletop — approximate distance ~1.5 m from camera.
